_comment: Pre/Post Process Nodes for N8N Agent Workflow - Import these nodes into your existing workflow

parameters.content:
## Pre/Post Process Hooks

These nodes check for optional pre/post process configurations in task.extra and execute webhooks as configured.

**Pre-Process:** Runs BEFORE AI, merges external data into input
**Post-Process:** Runs AFTER AI, pushes results externally

nodes.name: Execute Pre-Process Webhook
nodes.notes: Fetch external data before AI processing

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify((function() { const cfg = $('JSON Parse').item.json.extra?.post_process; const src = cfg?.input_source || 'output_only'; if (src === 'output_only') return $json.result; if (src === 'input_and_output') return { input: $('JSON Parse').item.json.data, output: $json.result }; return $json.result; })()) }}

nodes.name: Execute Post-Process Webhook
nodes.notes: Push results to external system after AI processing

JSON Parse → Check Pre-Process.description: Replace existing 'JSON Parse → Get Active Key' connection with 'JSON Parse → Check Pre-Process'

Add AlongWith Attributes → Check Post-Pr.description: Replace existing 'Add AlongWith Attributes → Input - Submit Result Phase1' with 'Add AlongWith Attributes → Check Post-Process'

integration_guide.step_1: Copy all nodes from this file into your existing workflow
integration_guide.step_2: Delete connection: JSON Parse → Get Active Key
integration_guide.step_3: Create connection: JSON Parse → Check Pre-Process
integration_guide.step_4: Delete connection: Add AlongWith Attributes → Input - Submit Result Phase1
integration_guide.step_5: Create connection: Add AlongWith Attributes → Check Post-Process
integration_guide.step_6: Verify all other connections match the 'connections' section above
